NCT02720094.name: HPTN 083
NCT02720094.group: MSM and transgender women, cabotegravir 600 mg IM Q8W vs TDF/FTC 200/300 mg PO daily (median 2.6 y)
NCT02720094.snippet: Source: Landovitz RJ et al. N Engl J Med 2021;385:595-608 (HPTN 083).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 4,566 cisgender men who have sex with men and transgender women at high risk of HIV acquisition randomized 1:1 double-blind double-dummy to cabotegravir 600 mg IM every 8 weeks plus placebo oral tablets (n=2,282) or TDF/FTC 200/300 mg PO daily plus placebo IM injections (n=2,284). Enrolled across 43 sites in 7 countries.

evidence.label: Primary - Incident HIV Infection
evidence.text: Over median follow-up 2.6 years: 13 incident HIV infections in cabotegravir arm (0.41 per 100 person-years) vs 39 in TDF/FTC arm (1.22 per 100 person-years); hazard ratio 0.34 (95% CI 0.18 to 0.62; P<0.001). 66% relative reduction. Primary efficacy endpoint met.

evidence.label: Secondary - Resistance and Safety
evidence.text: Integrase-inhibitor resistance emerged in 3 of 13 cabotegravir infections (vs 1 of 39 TDF/FTC infections with resistance to either drug). Injection-site reactions in 81% of cabotegravir arm (mild/moderate in >95%). No new safety signals.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - central IVR randomization stratified by site and age. D2 LOW - double-blind double-dummy design (matched placebo injections + placebo oral tablets in both arms). D3 LOW - 94% primary follow-up. D4 LOW - central HIV seroconversion testing. D5 LOW - SAP locked; DSMB paused study early due to superiority.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: t. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* MSM and TGW, 18 years or older at the time of screening (male at birth)~* Willing to provide informed consent for the study~* At high risk for sexually acquiring HIV infection based on self-report of at least one of the following:~  * Any condomless receptive anal intercourse in the 6 months prior to enrollment (condomless anal intercourse within a monogamous HIV seronegative concordant relationship does not meet this criterion)~ * More than five partners in the 6 months p...

NCT03164564.name: HPTN 084
NCT03164564.group: Cisgender women aged 18-45 in sub-Saharan Africa, cabotegravir LA vs TDF/FTC (median 1.24 y)
NCT03164564.snippet: Source: Delany-Moretlwe S et al. Lancet 2022;399:1779-1789 (HPTN 084).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 3,224 cisgender women aged 18-45 years at high risk of HIV acquisition in sub-Saharan Africa randomized 1:1 double-blind double-dummy to cabotegravir LA 600 mg IM every 8 weeks (n=1,614) or TDF/FTC daily (n=1,610). Enrolled across 20 sites in Botswana, Eswatini, Kenya, Malawi, South Africa, Uganda, Zimbabwe.

evidence.label: Primary - Incident HIV Infection
evidence.text: Over median follow-up 1.24 years: 4 incident HIV infections in cabotegravir arm (0.20 per 100 person-years) vs 36 in TDF/FTC arm (1.85 per 100 person-years); hazard ratio 0.12 (95% CI 0.05 to 0.31; P<0.0001). 89% relative reduction. Primary efficacy endpoint met; DSMB recommended unblinding at interim analysis.

evidence.label: Secondary - Adherence and Safety
evidence.text: Injection-visit adherence in cabotegravir arm: 93% of scheduled injections received within the target window. In TDF/FTC arm, pharmacy dispensing adherence tracked but plasma tenofovir levels suggested incomplete daily adherence in a subgroup. Grade 3+ adverse events balanced; 3/4 cabotegravir-arm infections had detectable integrase-inhibitor resistance.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - central IVR randomization. D2 LOW - double-blind double-dummy. D3 LOW - 97% completion. D4 LOW - central HIV testing (HIV-1 RNA + 4th-gen antibody). D5 LOW - SAP locked; interim analysis triggered unblinding on superiority.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: FEMALE; min age 18 Years; max age 45 Years; healthy volunteers: t. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Born female~* 18-45 years at the time of screening~* Willing and able to provide informed consent~* Willing and able to undergo all required study procedures~* Non-reactive HIV test results at Screening and Enrollment. Note: HIV-uninfected, based on HIV test results obtained at Screening and just prior to randomization at the Enrollment visit. title: RapidMeta Infectious Disease | Cabotegravir LA for HIV Pre-Exposure Prophylaxis v1.0
